plan.summary: Created plan, research, data model, quickstart, and 4 JSON contracts; Analyze later corrected split order to PRSG-010A final hatch, PRSG-010B contextual router, PRSG-010C O5, PRSG-010D docs/parity/polish.
26 items; 6 gaps remediated; 0 [Gap] markers remaining. Tightened final gate state, re-slicing packet, exception state, PR creation stop, and weak probe fallback evidence.
Executor returned no unresolved consensus items.
24 items; 5 gaps remediated; 0 [Gap] markers remaining. Tightened O5 branch/path equality, rollup completeness, generated MOC ownership, and router fixture schema validation.
Checklist executor stalled after generating the checklist; parent remediated explicit gaps locally and no unresolved consensus items remained.
27 items; 6 gaps remediated; 0 [Gap] markers remaining. Tightened operator re-slicing steps, O5 default-boundary guidance, and non-boilerplate exception education.
Executor returned no unresolved consensus items.
24 items; 4 gaps remediated; 0 [Gap] markers remaining. Tightened flat spec discovery, typed exception continuity, PRSG-007/008/009 compatibility, and Claude/Codex mirror parity evidence.
Executor returned no unresolved consensus items.
Generated tasks.md with 57 tasks across setup, foundational, PRSG-010A, PRSG-010B, PRSG-010C, and PRSG-010D; G5 passed with 0 markers.
Remediated split-stack order drift, reviewability/file-operation drift, and workflow metadata drift; G6 passed with 0 CRITICAL/HIGH findings remaining.
Analyze returned no unresolved consensus items.

Confidence gate returned NO_DATA in advisory mode with recommended action soft_skip; atomicity route returned one-navigable-PR, releasable true, signal change-shape:modify-heavy, and advisory contextual hints.
Foundation and PRSG-010A final hatch are complete. Next implementation slice is PRSG-010B contextual router probes.

validation.marker_scan: 0 NEEDS CLARIFICATION, 0 Gap, 0 CRITICAL in spec.md

phase1_specify.summary: Phase 1 Specify generated the PRSG-010 feature spec and completed quality validation.

outcomes: Final diff-gate matrix is pass/warn/exception proceed, block/exit 1 without honored exception stops with re-slicing, and exit 2 stops as gate error without re-slicing.
The unexcepted block path stops immediately after recording state and packet, before PR body generation, single PR creation, or multi-PR emission.
Blocked state is recorded in a top-level final_reviewability_gate object and downstream PR steps are not treated as started.
The re-slicing packet is a JSON contract with gate evidence, exception evidence, PRSG-007/008/009 recovery guidance, suggested slice boundaries, and resume instructions.
Operator-owned typed exceptions must be exact branch-added Markdown pragmas in committed, review-visible, non-generated CONTRACT artifacts.

clarify_results.session: O5 parent/child schema and status rollup
outcomes: The O5 parent manifest lives at specs/<parent-branch>/o5-parent-manifest.json as review-visible CONTRACT data with schemaVersion 1.
Child IDs use PRSG-010A-style suffixes with paths and branches like specs/prsg-010a-<slug>; manifest children[] order is authoritative.
Child MOCs keep up: pointed at the roadmap and add curated body links to parent manifest and shared design concept; retrospective links wait until the target exists.
O5 parent scaffold does not create child branches or worktrees automatically; each child is scaffolded independently as a flat sibling.
Status validates topology first and computes read-only rollup in manifest child order, reporting drift against optional declared_rollup_status.

Flag-system evidence is decisive only with repo-local flag/evaluation evidence plus current guard and test tasks; it emits context:flag-system:guarded-cutover and routes guarded non-hard-atomic cutovers to one-navigable-PR.
No-flag release-held cutovers emit context:release-cadence:release-held-cutover and route single-atomic-PR without automatically setting releasable:false.
Branch-by-abstraction may emit only with all in-tree consumers, coexistence behind abstraction, complete migration/contract tasks, and no hard-atomic or releasability risk.
Weak, stale, conflicting, fixture-only, code-fence-only, or shallow evidence remains route-neutral and hint-only.
PRSG-010 promotes or adds production routing-decision.schema.json, extends existing PRSG-007 signal enums, and closes hints[] with stable enum tokens.

consensus_resolution_log.outcome: Accept only exact branch-added Markdown pragmas in committed, review-visible, non-generated CONTRACT artifacts; reject .process, templates, generated zones/boilerplate, PR bodies, commit messages, code fences, and mutable/generated provenance, recording accepted and rejected candidates with path, line, provenance, and reason.

Use specs/<parent-branch>/o5-parent-manifest.json as review-visible CONTRACT data with schemaVersion 1, kind o5_parent_manifest, parent metadata, ordered children, shared design concept, nullable retrospective, and optional declared_rollup_status.

consensus_resolution_log.item: O5 flat child naming and order
consensus_resolution_log.outcome: Use PRSG-010A-style child IDs and specs/prsg-010a-<slug> paths or branches. children[] order is authoritative; depends_on[] may reference only earlier sibling child IDs and invalid topology covers duplicates, unknown refs, later refs, nested paths, and cycles.

Keep child SPEC-MOC up: pointed at the roadmap. Add curated relative body links outside generated zones to the parent manifest and shared design concept, and add retrospective links only after the target exists.

speckit-status validates manifest topology first, computes child states from workflow/MOC/archive evidence in manifest order, applies precedence invalid topology > blocked/failed > in_progress > pending > complete, and reports drift if optional declared_rollup_status disagrees with computed read-only status.

Require repo-local flag/evaluation evidence plus current guard and test tasks; emit context:flag-system:guarded-cutover and route non-hard-atomic guarded cutovers to one-navigable-PR unless proven additive multi-seam evidence still warrants split-PR.
Proven no-flag release-held cutovers emit context:release-cadence:release-held-cutover and route single-atomic-PR without automatically setting releasable:false.

Keep flat route/releasable/signals/hints/warnings JSON, promote or add production routing-decision.schema.json, extend existing PRSG-007 signal enums with context/strategy tokens, and close hints[] with stable enum tokens for weak/conflicting contextual evidence.
